```{=latex}
\begin{center}
\itshape
```

# In Gratitude  {.unnumbered}

This book was inspired by the many who challenged and supported me through the years. I am deeply grateful to family, friends, and spiritual kin. Without them, this book would mean nothing to me. 

Most of all, I want to thank God for allowing me the opportunity to read His words, collaborate with diverse perspectives, and write the following pages. 

From the very depths of myself... 

Thank you!

```{=latex}
\end{center}
```
